sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Vuk a pakna mual dawn pan, khang lam leimong dongah;
A mual a guam a zang pan, Tui tung leitung
tengah;
A teeng mite khempeuh in, Pasian’ lam khial khin hi;
Tua khialhna kol sut ding-in,
Eite hong sam uh hi.

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Khua lumna gam sunga nung, Huihvot nuam mahmah a;
Etlawm a tamna
gam sung, Mihingte sia khin ta;
Pasian hong hehpihna in, A mawkna suak khin hi;
Lawkite’n
mittaw bangin, Sing leh suang bia uh hi.

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Vantung khuavak thu theisa, Khuavak ta eite
in;
Khuamial sunga mangthang sa, Mite khuavak puakin;
Gamlapi a om mite, Pasian meivak puak
ni;
Hotkhiatna thu thei lote lungdamna thu puak ni.

sections.label: Verse 4
lines: Ama lungdamna thupha, Huih aw va
lenpih in;
Mi khempeuh theih ding thupha, Tuipi’n va luan pih in;
Mawhneite tang ding sih
thuak, Tuuno A hong pai ding;
I kumpi dingin hong tuak, lungdamna tawh mang ding.
